text:
There was a timid squirrel who loved apples. One autumn day, he stole some fresh apples from an old lady's house. When she saw him, she screeched loudly. The squirrels fled. Our brave little squirrel went home, ate them deliciously, learned a big lesson about stealing... and eventually got his own apple tree.
